rulings.Case Title: RYAN GEMBALA ET AL VS. ALMA BACHRACH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 10, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANTs ALMA BACHRACH, OSCAR GUERRERO, and ALFONSO GUERRERO's Motion For Leave Of Court To File Cross-Complaint Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you personally appear for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling) in an editable format to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020") Defendant's Motion for Leave to File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Stipulation on file. = (501/CFH)
